title: doctor three-state (ready/degraded/blocked) + attest verb + version-scoped verdicts (D4/D5/D6)
action: SERIALIZED after g22-1 (advisor wave fix â€” same bee.mjs + registry file; worker rebases onto the g22-1 merge commit first). templates/bee.mjs doctor section: doctorOverallStatus -> three states: 'blocked' when any MECHANICAL blocking row not-ok; 'degraded' when mechanical ok but trust rows structurally unknown (re-class the 4 rows from blocking to degraded-class with degraded_reason naming /hooks); 'ready' = mechanical green + VALID attestation. New verb doctor.attest (registry + handler): records {hooks_file_sha256, codex_version, session_id, at, repo_identity} to a gitignored runtime-tier file. D5-REVISED validity (advisor R4 â€” the observation leg is CLAUDE-ONLY because hooks.jsonl is deny/crash-only and tools.jsonl is claude-only): codex VALID = current .codex/hooks.json sha matches + current codex --version matches + repo identity unchanged (static attest; the reason string says honestly that codex exposes no hook-fire event surface, so liveness is not attestable); claude VALID additionally requires one bee tool/hook event with ts > attestation.at in .bee/logs/tools.jsonl. Any failed leg -> attestation inert with the stale reason named -> degraded, never ready. D6: version-scope trust wording â€” probed-version constant (0.144.4); live codex --version differs -> rows say unprobed_version (suggest re-probe), never blanket unsupported. Fixtures in test_conformance.mjs + test_bee_cli.mjs: blocked / degraded / ready(static attest on codex) / stale (hash flip) / version-mismatch wording / claude observation leg. Mirrors + manifest.

truths: three states each proven by fixture: blocked / degraded / ready
ready requires a valid attestation incl. a post-attestation observed event; any of the four validity legs failing -> degraded with the stale reason named
trust verdict wording is version-scoped: live version != probed version -> unprobed_version, never blanket unsupported
attest verb is registry-complete (bijection + example) and writes only gitignored runtime-tier state

verify: node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Doctor is three-state with codex ready actually reachable via static attest (hash+version+identity, honest no-liveness reason); trust rows degrade instead of block; verdicts version-scoped (unprobed_version); attest verb additive-routed; gitignore coverage side-fixed
trace.verification_evidence:
# g22-3 â€” done report (doctor three-state + attest + version scoping)

Worker: g22-3-worker (sonnet, isolated worktree, rebased onto e784665).

regen). 2026-07-19.

## What shipped
- **D4**: `doctorOverallStatus` â†’ ready/degraded/blocked. Mechanical rows
  (hooks file, baseline match, handlers, skills, claude wiring rows) are
  blocking â†’ `blocked`. Codex's 4 trust rows re-classed `degrades:true` +
  degraded_reason â†’ hold `degraded`, cleared only by a valid attestation.
  Claude: mechanical green = ready (no trust rows; documented).
- **D5-REVISED**: `bee doctor attest --runtime codex` (additive routing via
  the existing longest-prefix match â€” `bee doctor --runtime X` byte-identical
  to before). Record {hooks_file_sha256, codex_version, session_id, at,
  repo_identity} in gitignored `.bee/doctor-attest.json`. Validity = hash +
  version + realpath identity; any drift â†’ inert with named reason
  (hash_changed/version_changed/identity_changed/no_attestation). No liveness
  leg on codex â€” stated honestly in the reason text.
- **D6**: PROBED_CODEX_VERSION='0.144.4'; live version parsed from
  `codex --version`; mismatch â†’ trust rows carry `unprobed_version:` prefix
  instead of asserting probed conclusions.
- Expectation updates (all named in the worker report): ok-fixture codex
  not_readyâ†’degraded; trust rows blockingâ†’degrades; --json enum; conformance
  scenario-12 cleanâ†’degraded / driftedâ†’blocked (+ a missing sidecar the old
  fixture masked). New tests: valid attestâ†’ready; stale hashâ†’degraded;
  attest on claude refused; missing hooks fileâ†’blocked; unprobed-version
  wording via PATH-stubbed fake codex.
- Side fix: `.bee/doctor-attest.json` added to the onboarding gitignore block
  (it had no coverage anywhere) + repo .gitignore.
- 6-way mirrors; manifest regenerated.
